Bed frame was used to store empty boxes for less than a year. In new condition. House does have cats. No mattress but we can help provide a new one from IKEA if needed. Has bed slats. 

Description from IKEA reads: 
"You can use the space under the bed for working or studying by completing with VITVAL desk top, or create a cosy spot for seating.

Easy to assemble since the fabric is divided into sections and the edge bands are elastic.

The construction is light but steady, and has soft shapes.

The ladder mounts on the right or the left side of the bed."

name: Transfer Walking Belt
description:
A transfer walking belt (or gait belt) is a safety device used by caregivers to guide, support, and transfer individuals with limited mobility, such as moving from a bed to a wheelchair. These belts, often featuring padded handles for comfort and improved grip, are applied snugly around the patient's waist over clothing to reduce the risk of falls and caregiver back injury.
